posts.author: Ludovic (Skills4all)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We have a problem on Integromat and Monday.com, I would like to select a specific field in our table but we can’t choose a “sub-item specific column changes”, it gives us an error message "A subitem’s board is selected.

How do I select a specific tab with Integromat and Monday.com?

image403×605 45.1 KB

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Ludovic this is most certainly a limitation on make.com there is a very similar community over there which may be able to assist: community.make.com

I’m curious what module/app in make you are using ‘Create a Webhook’ doesn’t appear to be in my list of selections for a core plan. I recommend re-posting this on the community.make.com forum and tapping the experts over there.

Best!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Ludovic

I would recommend using the monday specific “general” webhook module “Watch Events” (you can find it at the very bottom of the monday modules). Then create the monday integration manually using this recipe:
